description: Fragment of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Twelfth-century Spanish hand, similar to several documents from India Book IV (e.g., ח44 and ח45). Only a few phrases are readily legible: אדאם אללה עז . . . אלפאצל אלגליל אבו אסחק . . . אלנשיא . . . ותוגה אלי דלך אל . . . וגב אעלאמך דלך . . . . The mention of an Abū Isḥāq and a Nasi may help identify the context. Needs further examination.
